mapper.select: select r.id as r_id, r.name,r.description, r.material, r.image_Path, r.category, i.id as i_id,i.icon_name, i.icon_path from zubora_recipes r left join icons i on r.material like concat('%', i.icon_name, '%') order by r.id

select r.id as r_id,r.name, r.description, r.material, r.image_Path, r.category, i.id as i_id, i.icon_name, i.icon_path from zubora_recipes r left join icons i on r.material like concat('%', i.icon_name, '%') where r.id=#{id}

select r.id as r_id, r.name, r.description, r.material, r.image_Path, r.category, i.id as i_id, i.icon_name, i.icon_path from zubora_recipes r left join icons i on r.material like concat('%', i.icon_name, '%') where r.category = #{category} order by r.id
